reviews.comment:
SOMOS SOCIOS PAGAMOS CASI 9LUCAS X MES. LOS BAÑOS MADRE MIA! JAMAS FUI A UN ACA TAN MUGRIENTO, MAS LIMPIO ORINAR EN EL SUELO QUE EN ESTA MUGRE. TE QUEJAS CIN LAS EMPLEADAS 10 DE SEPTIEMBRE TURNO TARDE Y TE MIRAN CON CARA DE QUE ME IMPORTA. HAY CRIATURAS NO PUEDEN USAR ESE BAÑO. MUGRIENTOS!!!

(Translated by Google)
WE ARE MEMBERS, WE PAY ALMOST 9 LUCAS PER MONTH. THE BATHROOMS ARE OH MY GOD! I HAVE NEVER BEEN TO SOMETHING SO DIRTY HERE, IT'S CLEANER TO URINATE ON THE FLOOR THAN IN THIS DIRT. YOU COMPLAIN TO THE EMPLOYEES ON SEPTEMBER 10, AFTERNOON SHIFT, AND THEY LOOK AT YOU LIKE I DON'T CARE. THERE ARE CHILDREN, THEY CAN'T USE THAT BATHROOM. DIRTY!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNacnA2X2JREAE

reviews.comment:
El nivel de la atención al cliente es malo, a la hora de llamar una moza podes esperar bastante.
Los platos son medio pelo pero barato
Ideal para quienes quieren gastar poco y tienen tiempo

(Translated by Google)
Customer service is poor; you can expect a long wait to get a waitress.
The food is mediocre but cheap. Ideal for those on a budget who have time.
